events.title: Final Friday
events.description:
Join us for a night of fun and fellowship at Final Fridays Gospel Bingo & Karaoke on May 29th from 6 PM to 10 PM! 



Get ready for an evening filled with uplifting music, exciting games, and a chance to win cash prizes and so much more! 



Don’t miss out on our VIP package for just $25, which includes a fantastic stage front seat and a gospel bingo play. Experience the excitement up close!

events.title: Sapphics Speed Dating Ages 21-40
events.description:
Find love in Indianapolis with in-person singles and matchmaking events curated by locals. 




This is for the LGBTQIA community. “Sapphic” is an umbrella term for women, nonbinary people, and feminine-aligned individuals who are attracted to other women or feminine-aligned people. 
Find love with in-person singles and matchmaking events curated by locals. Go on at least eight 5-minute dates in one night, matched with the most compatible people in the room! Use your phone to navigate tables, ma

events.title: Man Seeking Men Speed Dating Ages 21-40
events.description:
Find love in Indianapolis with in-person singles and matchmaking events curated by locals. 




This is for the LGBTQIA community for men seeking men to date. 
Find love with in-person singles and matchmaking events curated by locals. Go on at least eight 5-minute dates in one night, matched with the most compatible people in the room! Use your phone to navigate tables, make your choices, and receive mutual match emails at the end of the night. 
If you want to make real connections, this is the

events.title: Trans Pride Fest
events.description: This event is an annual get together for transgender nonconforming people and those who support them in our allies to come and celebrate our trans community!

events.title: Momentum: Fueling Entrepreneurs, Fast-Tracking Ideas
events.description:
Topic: TBD 
​Have an idea you want to explore? Need help taking your concept to the next level? Curious about early-stage entrepreneurship? Join us at 16 Tech for Momentum, a monthly, action-driven speaker series designed to engage and support early-stage entrepreneurs, founders, and small business owners. 
​Enjoy a lunch-and-learn with practical insights, discussion and networking opportunities. The bonus? All registrants will enjoy free coworking from 9 AM – 5 PM the day of the Momentum. Sign

events.title: Welding & CNC Plasma Cutter Workshop
events.description:
Discover the art of welding at Machyne Makerspace! 




Join our welding workshop perfect for both beginners and experienced welders. 
What You’ll Learn and Do: 
Metal Fabrication: Master basic techniques, including cutting square tube stock using a cold saw, chop saw, and angle grinder. 
MIG Welding: Experience hands-on MIG welding with a Lincoln Electric Easy MIG 180, practicing tack welds and beads. 
Finishing Skills: Get tips on fixing materials, cleaning up welds, and applying finishes. 
Pr

events.title: Nerd Nite
events.description:
Bringing big city events to Indianapolis, because why can’t we have fun things? 




Hey nerds of Indy… We all know that learning is more fun when you’re drinking with friends and colleagues. 
Bring friends, make new ones, and learn something you never knew you needed to know. 
Thus, Nerd Nite is a monthly event held in dozens of cities across the globe during which several folks give 20-minute fun-yet-informative presentations across all disciplines – while the audience drinks along. 
And there

events.title: Sassy Seniors
events.description:
In 1980 the Sassy Seniors exercise class was created at Municipal Gardens Family Center, a facility of the Indianapolis Public Parks, and provided seniors with a way to socialize and exercise. For 4 decades the group has served the community and now we perform at nursing homes, rehabilitation centers, parties, fairs and festivals. 
Join the Sassy Seniors as they break a sweat on the AMP stage!

events.title: Free Cowork Friday: May 2026
events.description:
Each month on the final Friday, we open our doors to anyone interested in trying out coworking! Potential new members can come in and enjoy free coffee & coworking as they test drive what a Launch Fishers membership is all about. We provide a reliable place to work for all sorts of people: entrepreneurs, remote workers, consultants, and more! 
Benefits of Launch Fishers membership: a comfortable workspace, a great community of fellow coworkers, phone booths, meeting & conference rooms, in-house

events.title: LEARN AT LAUNCH | The Business of Play: Building a Sustainable Economic Engine Through Sports
events.description: How does Indiana stay at the top of the leaderboard? Join us for an exclusive look into the playbook of Indiana Sports Corp, the organization behind some of the most iconic sporting moments in the nation. For startups and small to mid-sized businesses, this engaging session will highlight how major sporting events and volunteer-driven initiatives can be leveraged for team building, brand visibility, and customer engagement. Whether you are a sports enthusiast, a civic leader, or a business profe

events.title: Raise Right: The Founder-Capital Ecosystem Summit
events.description:
A full-day summit connecting the Midwest’s tech Founders, capital providers, and ecosystem builders.





Raise Right is a full-day summit dedicated to demystifying the capital stack and bridging Indiana’s founder and capital communities. Presented by Launch Fishers and Intrepid, the day brings together tech founders and execs, capital providers, and ecosystem builders for candid conversation, high-signal panels, and real connections that will last beyond the event.
Featuring a fireside chat and

events.title: Coffee & Conversation: June 2026
events.description:
Mornings are better when we get together. ☕️ 
Imagine starting your day with a vibrant buzz, not just from your coffee, but from connecting with fellow local innovators. Our monthly Coffee & Conversation event is designed to do just that. 
Join us on the second Thursday of every month at 8:30 AM for a morning of free coffee, delicious donuts and making valuable connections that can help propel your business forward. This event is specifically crafted to bring Fishers businesses and entrepreneurs

events.title: Indy.rb - The Indianapolis Ruby Brigade Monthly Meetup
events.description:
Indyrb - Indianapolis Ruby Brigade
Join us to talk about Ruby, work projects, hack on something, or just get a drink or bite & enjoy the company.

We are mixing it up again and meeting this month at The Ale Emporium Castleton location
8617 Allisonville Rd
Indianapolis, 46250

events.title: June 2026 CINLUG Meeting — Environment Dotfiles
events.description:
CINLUG | Central Indiana Linux Users Group
Turn setting up a new GNU/Linux environment from a tedious chore into a seamless transition by mastering your dotfiles. Mike Slattery[1]‘s talk will teach you how to manage your personalized, digital workspace’s DNA across all devices and environments. You will learn to build a single-command bootstrap script for fresh setups, securely manage secrets, and create a perfectly tailored, effortlessly portable environment that follows you everywhere.

CINLUG
